counter.label: MATCHING NOW
counter.unit: ads in Platsbanken. Updates when you change your choices.

start.title: Welcome to Jobbliggaren
start.intro: Set up your matching and we will show jobs that suit you. It takes about a minute and you can change everything later.
start.pitchTitle: We match Platsbanken ads against your profile
start.pitchBody: Tell us what you are looking for: occupations, skills and where you want to work. We highlight ads that suit you and count new matches every day.
start.uploadTitle: Upload your CV and we will fill in suggestions for you
start.uploadBody: PDF or Word (DOCX), max 10 MB. We suggest occupations and skills from the content. Your CV is not changed.
start.noCv: No CV to hand? Continue without a CV and choose everything yourself.
start.cvDoneBody: We have filled in suggested occupations and skills in the steps. The suggestions are not saved to your CV.

yrken.intro: Choose the occupations you are looking for. We suggest based on your CV, but you decide what is included.
yrken.introNoCv: Choose the occupations you are looking for. Search below and add the ones that suit you.
yrken.empty: No occupations selected yet. Choose from the suggestions or search below.
yrken.emptyNoCv: No occupations selected yet. Search for an occupation below to add it.

komp.intro: The suggestions come from your CV. Remove what does not fit and add what is missing.
komp.introNoCv: Add the skills you want to match on. Fewer but more accurate skills give better matching than many broad ones.
komp.empty: No skills selected. We then match without skill requirements.

orter.intro: Choose the counties or municipalities where you want to work. Leave empty for the whole country.
orter.empty: No locations selected. We match across the whole country.

former.intro: Choose the employment types you are open to. Leave empty for all.
former.note: Most ads are under Regular employment. Leave empty to match all.

granska.title: Review and save
granska.intro: Check your choices. You can change each part from here.

done.title: Your matching is saved
done.body: New matches appear under Jobs and are counted on the Overview. You can change everything at any time under Matching.
